title: ジャパンCの後に・そして、タイマンへ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon wins the Japan Cup. Narita Brian
may have lost the race, but she hasn't lost the
fight in her yet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon tells Narita Brian that she's the only
person who can match her as an opponent.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian, having chased after her sister's
shadow for so long, now turns her focus to Hishi
Amazon. She won't relinquish the Arima Kinen to
her—and that's a promise.
